evidence.error: Exploratory validation blocked: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
evidence.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the scenario of 'Auto-offer when cancellation occurs' but did not provide any concrete evidence that this functionality is implemented or operational. The linked use case outlines the need for automatic notifications to qualified substitutes upon cancellation, yet there is no evidence confirming that such notifications are being sent or that the system behaves as expected in this scenario. This indicates a clear gap in the requirement as the necessary evidence to support the expected outcome is missing.
gaps: No evidence of automatic notifications being sent to qualified substitutes upon cancellation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
